name: sessions
description: Browse and search your own conversation history. An agent can only access its own sessions — cross-agent access is not permitted. Provides listing, full message retrieval, and pattern-based search across session files.
commands: list --include-active                 — also include the currently running session
get <key>                             — show full message history of a session
get <key> --all                       — show all messages (default truncates at 50)
grep <pattern>                        — search messages across your sessions (up to 100, newest first)
grep <pattern> --session <key>        — search within one session only
grep <pattern> --max-sessions <n>     — search up to N sessions (default: 100)
grep <pattern> --max-matches <n>      — stop after N total matches (default: 50)
